zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis"於1358年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯時，他的父親Simon le Fleming31歲，母親Cicely Champernon29歲。他於大約1380年與Elizabeth Preston在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1434年5月在愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德尤加爾享年76歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克尤加爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis"于1358年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯时，他的父亲Simon le Fleming31岁，母亲Cicely Champernon29岁。他于大约1380年与Elizabeth Preston在爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1434年5月在爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德尤加爾享年76岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 科克尤加爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" was born in 1358, in County Meath, Ireland, his father, Simon le Fleming, was 31 and his mother, Cicely Champernon, was 29. He married Elizabeth Preston about 1380, in Cornwall, County Wexford, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in May 1434, in Youghal, County Waterford, Ireland, at the age of 76, and was buried in Youghal, County Cork, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" est né en 1358, à County Meath, Irlande, son père, Simon le Fleming, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Cicely Champernon, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Preston environ 1380, à Cornwall, County Wexford, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en mai 1434, à Youghal, County Waterford, Irlande, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Youghal, County Cork, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" 1358 in County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon le Fleming 31 und seine Mutter Cicely Champernon 29. Er hat um 1380 in Cornwall, County Wexford, Irland Elizabeth Preston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb im Mai 1434 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Youghal, County Waterford, Irland und wurde in Youghal, County Cork, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" è nato il nel 1358 nel County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Simon le Fleming, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Cicely Champernon, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Preston circa 1380, nel Cornwall, County Wexford, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel maggio 1434, nel Youghal, County Waterford, Irlanda, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis"が1358年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスで生まれた時，父Simon le Flemingは31歳，母Cicely Champernonは29歳であった。約1380年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードコルンワルでElizabeth Prestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1434年5月にアイルランドコウントイ ワテルフォードイオウアルで76歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ コルクイオウアルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis"(이)가 1358년 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon le Fleming(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Cicely Champernon(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1380년 아일랜드 카운티 w스퍼드 코른월에서 Elizabeth Preston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1434년 5월 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 요우그할에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 요우그할에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" nasceu em 1358, em County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Simon le Fleming, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Cicely Champernon, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Preston aproximadamente 1380, em Cornwall, County Wexford, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em maio de 1434, em Youghal, County Waterford, Irlanda, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" родился в 1358 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Simon le Fleming было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Cicely Champernon, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Preston около 1380 г. в местности корнвалл, коунти вексфорд, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер май 1434 г. в местности еугэл, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности еугэл, коунти корк, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" nació en 1358, en County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Simon le Fleming, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Cicely Champernon, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Preston aproximadamente 1380, en Cornwall, County Wexford, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en mayo de 1434, en Youghal, County Waterford, Irlanda, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda.
